properties.label: Shader File
properties.description: Path to the ISF-format fragment shader (.fs) file that defines the visual effect. The shader runs on the GPU to generate the pixel output.

properties.label: Lead in frames
properties.description: Number of frames to pre-render before the effect starts, allowing time-based shaders to reach a desired visual state at the beginning of the effect.

properties.label: Time Speed
properties.description: Multiplier for the time value passed to the shader. Values above 1 speed up the animation, values below 1 slow it down, and negative values run the shader time in reverse.

properties.label: Offset X
properties.description: Horizontal offset of the shader viewport as a percentage. Shifts the visible portion of the shader output left or right.

properties.label: Offset Y
properties.description: Vertical offset of the shader viewport as a percentage. Shifts the visible portion of the shader output up or down.

properties.label: Zoom
properties.description: Zoom level for the shader output. Positive values zoom in (up to 10x), negative values zoom out, and zero shows the shader at its native scale.
